kv.memory.jmap-chat-spec-files-live-in-p: JMAP Chat spec files live in ~/PROJECT/jmap-chat-spec/ (sibling repo). Primary spec: draft-atwood-jmap-chat-00.md. Companions: draft-atwood-jmap-chat-wss-00.md, draft-atwood-jmap-chat-push-00.md, draft-atwood-jmap-cid-00.md, draft-atwood-jmap-chat-filenode-00.md, draft-atwood-jmap-chat-federation-00.md. Reference RFCs in references/ subdir. Do NOT look in jmap-chat-ui/docs/ — that directory has been deleted.
